race.comment: PARTY WITH SMARTY (3) raced on the speed last start and battled on well but found one better over 1609m at Laurel (Dirt). Can figure prominently. PATRICK'S PROMISE (4) finished third at Gulfstream Park Turf two runs back but was less effective last time over 1673m at Gulfstream Park Turf (Turf), finishing 18 lengths back in sixth. Finds a nice race and can make amends. TAVERN TIME (9) turned in an eye-catching run last start over 1408m at Parx (Dirt), dropping out early before coming home with a powerful run to finish third. Can run on into the finish. BRIGHTY (5) finished a 0.8 lengths second on dirt at Penn National two back then followed up with another minor placing on dirt at Laurel over 1609m four weeks ago. Makes plenty of appeal back on the turf. Something for the Multiples: DYNAFLAME (13) LIKE TYSON (11)
